entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/portal-ng-history-docker-verify-master/70/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/portal-ng-history-docker-verify-master/70

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/portal-ng-history-gradle-build-master/387/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/portal-ng-history-gradle-build-master/387

Abandoned

Abandoning: master branch already has this dependency at the target version (or newer). This change is redundant.

Context: A historical bug in lfreleng-actions/github2gerrit-action caused incorrect change correlation when dependabot updated existing PRs in place, leaving orphaned Gerrit changes. This cleanup resynchronises Gerrit with GitHub state. Dependabot will re-raise an equivalent change if a newer version becomes available.
